sitrep_excerpt:
=== BATTLEFIELD SITUATION REPORT (game step 879) ===
SCENARIO: Friendly marines face an enemy marine squad in open engagement terrain. No civilians in the area.

FRIENDLY UNITS (4):
  marine_101500005  (infantry)  zone=main_base
  marine_101940002  (infantry)  zone=main_base
  marine_101400005  (infantry)  zone=main_base
  marine_101740004  (infantry)  zone=main_base

ENEMY CONTACTS (1):
  marine_101ac0001  zone=engagement_zone_alpha (MILITARY TARGET)

ACTIVE RULES OF ENGAGEMENT:
  [DEFAULT rts_r3000] When military_unit(X), military_target(Y) -> unit may engage
  [DEFAULT rts_r3001] When military_unit(X), in_zone(X, engagement_zone_alpha), military_target(Y) -> unit may engage
  [DEFAULT rts_r3002] When military_unit(X), assigned_to_mission(X, op_thunderbolt), military_target(Y) -> unit may engage
  [EXCEPTION rts_r3003] When in_zone(X, restricted_zone_alpha), in_zone(Y, restricted_zone_alpha) -> unit may NOT engage
  [EXCEPTION rts_r3004] When in_zone(Y, main_base) -> unit may NOT engage
  [EXCEPTION rts_r3005] When in_zone(Y, worker_mining_area) -> unit may NOT engage
  [EXCEPTION rts_r3006] When assigned_to_mission(X, op_ghost_eye), stealth_posture_active(X) -> unit may NOT engage
  [DEFAULT rts_r3007] When military_unit(X), under_direct_fire(X), hostile_unit(Y) -> unit may engage
  [DEFAULT rts_r3008] When military_unit(X), hostile_act_detected_near(X,Y) -> unit may engage
  [DEFAULT rts_r3009] When military_unit(X), critical_threat(Y), under_direct_fire(X) -> unit may en
